recent_decisions.title: Approval of minutes from previous meeting
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee unanimously approved the minutes from the January meeting as a correct record.

recent_decisions.title: Grant planning permission for Eden Tearoom and Galleries (2024/0020/FUL)
recent_decisions.political_summary: Planning permission granted for Eden Tearoom and Galleries, subject to conditions outlined in the report.
key_data_points: Conditions set out in paragraph 12.1 of the report

recent_decisions.title: Grant planning permission for Eden Tearoom and Galleries (2025/0990/FUL)
recent_decisions.political_summary: Planning permission granted for Eden Tearoom and Galleries, subject to conditions outlined in the report.
key_data_points: Conditions set out in paragraph 12.1 of the report

recent_decisions.title: Grant planning permission for Merridale Farm with revised conditions
recent_decisions.political_summary: Planning permission granted for Merridale Farm with conditions, including a revised Condition 12 for larger vehicles.
key_data_points: Final wording to be agreed with Chairperson
Application may be referred back if Highway Authority objects

recent_decisions.title: Grant planning permission for Land Adjacent 12, The Green, Hesketh Bank
recent_decisions.political_summary: Planning permission granted for land adjacent to 12, The Green, Hesketh Bank, subject to conditions and a Section 106 agreement for biodiversity net gain.
key_data_points: Section 106 agreement required for biodiversity net gain
Conditions set out in paragraph 12 of the report

recent_decisions.title: Annual report noted and published
recent_decisions.political_summary: The Standards Committee endorsed and approved the publication of its 2024-25 annual report, noting the work done over the past year. The report was unanimously noted and approved.

motions.text: That the Standards Committee Annual Report 2024/25, attached as an Appendix to the report, be noted, endorsed, and published on the Council’s website.

recent_decisions.title: Co-opted parish councillors asked to extend terms
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee resolved to ask co-opted parish councillors to consider extending their terms until 2028, as their current terms end in 2027.

motions.text: That the Co-Opted Parish Councillors appointed to Standards Committee, be approached to consider continuing their appointment until 2028.

recent_decisions.title: Complaints statistics noted
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee noted the complaints statistics for the period from September 2024 to September 2025, acknowledging delays due to procurement changes.
key_data_points: Two complaints received in the period

motions.text: That the Standards Complaints Statistics, for the period 17 September 2024 to 30 September 2025, be noted.

recent_decisions.title: Declaration of interests requirements approved
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved new requirements for members to declare interests, including a new rule to declare within 28 days of beginning eight consecutive years in office.

motions.text: That the requirement that all Members, Co-opted Members, Parish and Town Councillors shall complete a Declaration of Interest Form in the following circumstances be approved: • Within 28 days of taking office. • Within 28 days of becoming aware of a new interest. • Within 28 days of any meeting where a relevant interest arises and has not previously been declared • Within 28 days of beginning eight consecutive years in office as a Borough /Parish/Town Councillor

recent_decisions.title: Work programme noted
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee noted the work programme, which may include future work on merging with other councils due to local government reorganisation.

motions.text: That the work programme be noted.

recent_decisions.title: Council notes Treasury Management Strategy 2026-27
recent_decisions.political_summary: The council noted the Treasury Management Strategy for 2026-27, including prudential indicators and capital expenditure projections. No vote was recorded.
recent_decisions.financial_context: Treasury management and capital financing framework
key_data_points: Treasury and Prudential Indicators for next three years noted

motions.text: An Amendment to the Motion, circulated prior to the meeting, was moved and seconded.
That the report be noted and any comments forwarded to the Lead Member for Housing prior to the Council meeting on 26th February 2026.

recent_decisions.title: Noted GRA Q2 revenue position
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council noted the General Revenue Account (GRA) position for Q2 2025/26 without taking further action.
key_data_points: Q2 monitoring of GRA revenue position
Report provided summary of 2025/26 financial year
No financial adjustments or approvals made

recent_decisions.title: Noted revised Capital Programme and Q2 progress
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council noted the revised Capital Programme and progress at Q2 2025/26, including budget adjustments.
key_data_points: Budget adjustments included in Appendix A

recent_decisions.title: Approved HRA budget virements and reprofiling
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council approved £7.6m capital budget reprofiling from 2025/26 to 2026/27, along with revenue and capital budget virements.

recent_decisions.title: Noted Treasury Management and Prudential Indicators
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council noted the Treasury Management activity and Prudential Indicators performance for the first six months of 2025/26.
key_data_points: Treasury Management operations for first six months of 2025/26
No financial adjustments or approvals made

recent_decisions.title: Approved minutes of committee meetings
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council approved the minutes of several committee meetings held in October and November 2025, including recommendations.
key_data_points: Included Licensing & Appeals, Planning, Audit & Governance, Polling Districts, and Policy & Resources
Recommendations contained in minutes also approved

recent_decisions.title: Approved minutes of previous council meeting
recent_decisions.political_summary: Council approved the minutes of the previous meeting held on 26 November 2025 as a correct record.

recent_decisions.title: Approval of previous meeting minutes
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved the minutes of the previous meeting held on 20 November 2025.

recent_decisions.title: Refusal of planning application 2025/0883/PIP
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee refused planning application 2025/0883/PIP for Land at the junction of Sandy Lane and Back Lane, Newburgh, against officer recommendation, citing Green Belt grounds.
key_data_points: Application refused on Green Belt grounds

recent_decisions.title: Approval of planning application 2025/0360/FUL
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved planning application 2025/0360/FUL for Moss Bridge Barn, Moss Bridge Lane, Lathom, subject to conditions.

recent_decisions.title: Approval of planning application 2025/0480/FUL
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved planning application 2025/0480/FUL for a building adjacent to 10 Chorley Road, Hilldale, subject to conditions.

recent_decisions.title: Approval of response to statutory consultee system consultation
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved the proposed response to the Government consultation on reforms to the statutory consultee system, with an amendment to retain the 'Active Travel England' threshold at 150 dwellings.
key_data_points: 'Active Travel England' threshold retained at 150 dwellings

recent_decisions.title: Approved 2026/2027 licensing fees and charges
recent_decisions.political_summary: The committee approved proposed changes to licensing fees and charges for 2026/2027, aiming to balance costs and avoid overspending. No vote count recorded.
recent_decisions.financial_context: Fees and charges adjustments for licensing services
key_data_points: Fees adjusted to balance licensing service costs
Surplus offset in the next financial year

recent_decisions.title: Deferred private hire driver licence application
recent_decisions.political_summary: A private hire driver licence application was deferred due to missing Disclosure and Barring Certificate. No vote count recorded.

recent_decisions.title: Retained private hire driver licence with warning
recent_decisions.political_summary: A private hire driver licence was retained but the driver received a formal written warning due to DVLA offences. No vote count recorded.

recent_decisions.title: Approved new premises licence for Spar, Lathom with conditions
recent_decisions.political_summary: The council approved a new premises licence for Spar in Lathom with operating hours from 07:00 to 23:00 daily, including alcohol sales. No objections were raised, and the conditions were deemed sufficient to meet licensing objectives.
